title: Ghazals: The Wine of the Beloved
description: Hafiz of Shiraz — the poet Iranians know by heart: love, wine, hypocrisy, and the hidden face of God.
introduction: Hafiz of Shiraz — the poet Iranians know by heart: love, wine, hypocrisy, and the hidden face of God.

translation.original_text: الا یا ایها الساقی ادر کاسا و ناولها / که عشق آسان نمود اول ولی افتاد مشکلها
translation.text: Come, cupbearer, pass the cup and hand it round — for love seemed easy at first, but then the difficulties arose.
